Harvey has been in love before, deeply in fact, a love that was supposed to last till death forced them apart. He recieved two daughters out of it, two wonderful smart daughters he hasn't seen in a good decade and a half. His wife divorced him after he caught her cheating their daughters principal, fed some lie into their heads while Harvey was trying to get his mind together.

Was it really that bad that he now wanted to love again after so long? To finally allow himself to love again?

You're around the same age as him.

For the kinktober tag: Erectile disfunction! When you get into bed with him that is.
